summary: There was a statistically anomalous spike in adverse event reports for hydrochlorothiazide on 2024-10-22, with 71 reports received compared to an expected 27.96 based on Holt-Winters forecasting.
notable_pattern: Reports from this time window include a range of severe and life-threatening events, including renal failure, transient ischaemic attack, and hospitalizations.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should be further investigated before any conclusions can be drawn.
